data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Crew count and subcontractor tracking'. While the linked use case does mention crew counts (Concrete team: 6, Rebar crew: 4, Crane operator: 1), it does not provide any evidence of subcontractor tracking, which is a critical part of the requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding subcontractor tracking, leading to a failed validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
